---
toc: false
description: "Sustainability Lab at IIT Gandhinagar — AI-driven research for a sustainable future. Led by Prof. Nipun Batra. PhD positions available in AI for sustainability, health sensing, energy analytics, and environmental monitoring."
---

<div class="phd-recruitment-banner">
<strong>PhD Positions Available:</strong> We are actively looking for strong PhD students to work on AI for sustainability. <a href="openings.qmd">Learn more and apply</a>
</div>

<div class="hero-section">
<h1>Sustainability Lab</h1>
<p class="tagline">AI-driven research for a sustainable future</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="openings.qmd" class="hero-btn primary">Join Us</a>
<a href="papers/index.qmd" class="hero-btn secondary">Our Research</a>
<a href="flyer.pdf" class="hero-btn secondary" target="_blank">Lab Flyer</a>
</div>
</div>

## Research

<p class="section-subtitle">Projects at the intersection of AI and sustainability</p>

<div class="home-tag-filters">
<p style="margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--apple-gray-secondary);">Explore by area:</p>
<div class="home-tags">
<a href="projects.html?tag=air-quality" class="home-tag-link">Air Quality</a>
<a href="projects.html?tag=health-sensing" class="home-tag-link">Health Sensing</a>
<a href="projects.html?tag=nilm" class="home-tag-link">NILM</a>
<a href="projects.html?tag=computer-vision" class="home-tag-link">Computer Vision</a>
<a href="projects.html?tag=machine-learning" class="home-tag-link">Machine Learning</a>
<a href="projects.html" class="home-tag-link all-projects">All Projects</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="featured-projects">

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/JoulesEye_1.png" alt="JoulesEye" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>JoulesEye</h3>
<p>Energy expenditure estimation and respiration sensing from thermal imagery during exercise.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Health Sensing</span>
<span class="tag">Thermal Imaging</span>
<span class="tag">AI/ML</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/jouleseye/" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/SpiroMask.png" alt="SpiroMask" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>SpiroMask</h3>
<p>Smart respiratory monitoring system transforming regular face masks into health sensing devices.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Healthcare</span>
<span class="tag">IoT</span>
<span class="tag">Respiratory Health</span>
</div>
<a href="https://dl.acm.org/doi/fullHtml/10.1145/3570167" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/I_Dont_Know.png" alt="I Do Not Know" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>"I do not know"</h3>
<p>Quantifying Uncertainty in Neural Network Based Approaches for Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">NILM</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Uncertainty</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/VibhutiBansal-11/NILM_Uncertainty" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/sentinelkilndb.png" alt="SentinelKilnDB" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>SentinelKilnDB</h3>
<p>A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for OBB Brick Kiln Detection in South Asia Using Satellite Imagery.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Computer Vision</span>
<span class="tag">Earth Observation</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/sentinelkilndb/" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/space-to-policy.png" alt="Space to Policy" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Space to Policy</h3>
<p>Using satellite imagery and AI to monitor environmental compliance and inform policy decisions.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Satellite Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/brick-kilns/" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2024/VayuBuddy_diagram.png" alt="VayuBuddy" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>VayuBuddy</h3>
<p>An LLM-powered chatbot system to reduce the barrier between stakeholders and air quality sensor data</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/vayubuddy/" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/compass-india.png" alt="Samachar" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Samachar</h3>
<p>Print News Media on Air Pollution in India — analyzing how air quality is covered in Indian print media.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality</span>
<span class="tag">NLP</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/karm-patel/Samachar-News-media-on-air-pollution" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/Scalable_GaussianProcesses.png" alt="Gaussian Processes" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Scalable Gaussian Processes</h3>
<p>Machine learning approach for fine-grained air quality inference using Gaussian processes at scale.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Gaussian Processes</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/patel-zeel/AAAI22" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2014/ACM-energy14_NILMTK.png" alt="NILMTK" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>NILMTK</h3>
<p>An Open Source Toolkit for Non-intrusive Load Monitoring — pioneering framework for energy disaggregation research.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">NILM</span>
<span class="tag">Toolkit</span>
<span class="tag">Open Source</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/nilmtk/nilmtk" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2023/airdelhi.png" alt="AirDelhi" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>AirDelhi</h3>
<p>A fine-grained air quality dataset from mobile sensors on Delhi buses, enabling better pollution monitoring.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://neurips.cc/virtual/2023/poster/73476" class="project-link">Learn more</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 48px;">
<a href="papers/index.qmd" class="hero-btn secondary">View All Publications</a>
</div>

## Funding

<div class="funders-grid">

::: {.funder-block}
![Google](images/funders/google.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Cisco](images/funders/cisco.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![NVIDIA](images/funders/nvidia.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Microsoft](images/funders/microsoft.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![SERB](images/funders/serb.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![MOES](images/funders/moes.jpeg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![DST](images/funders/dst.jpg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![STARS](images/funders/stars.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Government of Gujarat Science](images/funders/gujcost.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![CoE in AI (MHRD)](images/funders/coe-ai-mhrd.svg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Gujarat Forest Department](images/funders/gfd.jpeg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Jio](images/funders/jio.png){.funder-logo}
:::

</div>

## Connect

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 32px 0; font-size: 17px; color: var(--apple-gray-secondary);">
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@SustainabilityLab-SL" target="_blank" class="hero-btn secondary">Lab YouTube</a>
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@NipunBatra0" target="_blank" class="hero-btn secondary">Teaching YouTube</a>
<a href="https://x.com/nipun_batra" target="_blank" class="hero-btn secondary">Twitter</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nipunbatra0/" target="_blank" class="hero-btn secondary">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

<div class="join-section">
<h2>Join the Lab</h2>
<p>We're looking for passionate researchers to drive innovation in sustainability through cutting-edge AI research.</p>

<div class="join-buttons">
<a href="openings.qmd" class="join-btn primary">View Openings</a>
<a href="upskilling.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Research Skills Bootcamp</a>
<a href="lab_culture.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Our Culture</a>
<a href="members.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Meet the Team</a>
</div>
</div>
